title: Introduction to AI Tools
description: Learn the fundamentals of AI tools and how they can transform your workflow. This course covers basic concepts, popular tools, and practical applications.

title: Advanced Prompt Engineering
description: Master the art of prompt engineering to get the best results from AI language models. Learn advanced techniques and strategies including chain-of-thought prompting and few-shot learning.

title: Building AI Applications
description: Learn how to build real-world AI applications using modern tools and frameworks. Hands-on projects included covering AI APIs, integration patterns, and deployment strategies.
